titleStmt.title: SII 9.562: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 562. (A.R. No. 547 of 1919.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE ARULALA-PERUMAL TEMPLE AT LITTLE CONJEEVERAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Pḥālguṇa, ba. 4, corresponding to A.D. 1534 March 4, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It re- cords that in the year Virōdhi, Kārtika, ba. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1529 October 21, Thursday, the day of his coronation, the king made a gift of some villages (named) to the gods, Varadarājasvāmi and Ēkāmbranātha, to be equally divided and that on finding that Sāḷuva-Nāyaka who was appointed for the purpose made unequal distribution, the king set it right. It also records the manner of distribution of the offerings among the priests and officials of the temple. The inscription is Damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja (rāja)rājaparamēśvara mūṟurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkara bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAccutarāyamahārāyarū prutthvīrājyaṁgeyyutta(ṁ) miralū śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1455 saṁdu mēle naḍeva vijayasaṁvachcharada pālguṇa ba 4 ralū śrīvīraAccutarāyamahārāyaru prāku virōdhisaṁvatsarada kārttika ba 5 lu paṭṭābhiṣēkastarāgi viṣṇukaṁciya varadarājadēvarigū Ēkāṁbranāthadēvarigū samanāgi taṁma paṭṭābhiṣēkadalu biṭṭa grāmagaḷanū sariyāgi koḍahēḷi svāmi sāḷuvanāykanige Appaṇeya cittaisalāgi Ā sāḷuvanāykaru tanage tirukāṇiyāciyāgalāgi grāmaEvery line
gaḷanū Ēkāṁbranāthadēvarige vāgi biṭṭu varadarājadēvarige kaḍameyāgi biḍalāgi Āmēle svāmi grāmagaḷanū heccu kuṁdāgi biṭṭiralāgi parāmarisi samavāgi samarpista grāmagaḷa vivara . varadarājadēvarige ciyevarada kāluvaḷigaḷu sahitavāgi ru grāma kāluvaḷi sahā grā 1 kke ga 60 pēṭe grā 1 kaṁ ga 85 Areyanēri kāluvaḷi sahā grā 1 kaṁ ga 930 pāleyūru kāluvaḷi sahā grā 1 kaṁ ga 420 gaṁgavaraṁ grā 1 kaṁ ga 155 Aṁtu grā 7 kīḷuvaḷigaḷu rāyasa prāmāṇakke Ēkāṁbranāthadēvarige biṭṭa Akkāḷi Āḷida grā 1 kaṁ gadya 150 grā 6 kaṁ ga 2000 kaṁ biḍuva naivēdya kaṭṭaḷe prāku
svāmi kaṭṭaḷe māḍiddu harivāṇa 54 Atirasa paḍi 2 dadhyōdanada harivāṇa harivāṇa 2 dīpa 50 yiṣṭake prāku kaṭṭaḷe māḍidu ga 1000 tathātithiyallū kaṭṭaḷeya māḍi rāyasava cittayistalli varadājaṁmmanavara Ubhayakke puḷugāppu Ēkādaśi 1 ke ga 40 lekhadalū varuṣa 1 kaṁ Ēkādaśi 25 kaṁ ga 1000 komāra veṁkaṭādriAyyanavara Ubhayaṁ dadhyaṁnada harivāṇa 2 kaṁ saṇṇakki 2 mosaru śuṁṭhi paccaḍi Uppu meṇasu jīrige meṁtheya pacaḍi sahā tiṁ 1 kaṁ ga 3¥ 2 . lekhadalū varuṣa 1 kaṁ ga 39 svāmiya Ubhayaṁ pallakkisēvege bijaya māḍūsū saṁmaṁdha tiruveḷaku paṁjige Eṁṇe di 1 kaṁ 6 paṁju 1 lekhadalū varuṣa 1 kaṁ
ga 360 Ēkāṁta Avasara naivēdyakaṭṭaḷe tiruvattisāma harivāṇa 2 kaṁ saṁṇakki 1 hālu tuppa sakhare bāḷehaṁṇu teṁginakāyi 1 kaṁ ga 3 . lekhadalū varuṣa 1 kaṁ ga 42 Aḍake 1 ke Aḍake 50 Ele 100 lekhadalū varuṣa 1 ke Āḍike 18000 ke ga 1 . 3 Ele 36000 ke ga 1 . 3 Ubhaya ga 3 . 1 di 1 kaṁ gaṁdha hala 1 lekha varuṣa 1 ke hala 3600 ka¥ 1 hala 6 lekhadalū ga 6 Ā kaṭṭaḷege ga 126 �yo naivēdyada prasāda Atirasa dadhyaṁna tiruvattisāma gaṁdha Aḍakele Ellavanūnṛ biṭṭavaviḷukāḍu nālkaṟali voṁdu pātrāvisēṣanu kaḷadu mikkādadanū nālku bageyavarū haṁcikoḷaluḷavarū �yo dharmmake �yo pramāṇadallū Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍisaluḷadū .
Digital edition of SII 9.562 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
